description: 该命令用于配置 Innovus 工具中通孔（via）生成的各种参数和行为。它提供了广泛的选项来控制通孔生成的精度、合并、对齐、间距、偏好规则、钩连（hook-up）行为以及与现有布线、设计边界和设计规则检查（DRC）的交互方式。用户可以通过此命令精细地调整通孔生成策略，以满足特定的设计、性能和制造要求。
usage: setViaGenMode [-help] [-reset] [-accuracy_effort {low|medium|high}] [-add_pin_to_pin_via {true|false}] [-align_merged_stack_via_metals {true|false}] [-allow_via_expansion {true|false}] [-allow_wire_shape_change {true|false}] [-area_only {true|false}] [-bot_enclosure {overhang1 overhang2}] [-create_double_row_cut_via {0|1|2}] [-create_max_row_cut_via {true|false}] [-cut_spacing {x_spacing y_spacing}] [-cutclass_preference <default|{[square] [bar] [large]}|<list of cut class names>|<file name>>] [-disable_via_merging {true|false}] [-extend_out_wire_end {true|false}] [-full_cut_via_only {true|false}] [-genvia_naming_prefix <viaNamePrefix>] [-hookup_contact_max <min max>] [-hookup_contact_pg_track <start pitch>] [-hookup_preplace_fix <0|1>] [-hookup_rail_pair {true|false}] [-hookup_via_distance <distance1 distance2 boundary_spacing>] [-hookup_via_fixed_grid {true|false}] [-hookup_via_min_distance <distance>] [-hookup_via_style {none|loose|compact|moderate}] [-hookup_via_viarule {filler {default |{list_of_via rule/cell_names }} ...}] [-hookup_virtual_trim_grid {default |{-layer -mask1 {-pitch -core_offset}}...}] [-ignore_design_boundary {true|false}] [-ignore_DRC {true|false}] [-ignore_viarule_enclosure {true|false}] [-inherit_wire_status {true|false}] [-invoke_verifyGeometry {true|false}] [-keep_existing_via {0|1|2}] [-keep_fixed_via {true|false}] [-mincut_preference <value>] [-optimize_cross_via {true|false}] [-optimize_via_on_routing_track {true|false}] [-parameterized_via_only {auto|true|false}] [-partial_overlap_threshold <threshold>] [-preferred_vias_only {use_lef|open|keep}] [-reference_boundary {design|core}] [-respect_signal_routes {0|1|2}] [-respect_stdcell_geometry {true|false}] [-respect_wire_ndr {true|false}] [-set_via_expansion_dir {auto|horizontal|vertical}] [-snap_via_center_to_grid {layer1 {{none | grid | half_grid | either} [hard]} layer2 {{none | grid | half_grid | either} [hard]} ...}] [-split_long_via_global_grid <x_offset x_pitch x_length_threshold x_length_multiplier y_offset y_pitch y_length_threshold y_length_multiplier>] [-symmetrical_via_only {auto|true|false}] [-top_enclosure {overhang1 overhang2}] [-use_track_offset {true|false}] [-use_trim_metal_enclosure {true|false}] [-viarule_preference <default|predefined|generated|<list of via rule/cell names>|<file name>>]

options.name: -help
options.description: 打印命令用法

options.name: -reset
options.description: 将所有或指定选项重置为默认值

options.name: -accuracy_effort
options.description: 指定生成通孔时的精度级别

options.name: -add_pin_to_pin_via
options.description: 在覆盖宏（cover macros）之间插入通孔以连接引脚

options.name: -align_merged_stack_via_metals
options.description: 对齐合并的堆叠通孔

options.name: -allow_via_expansion
options.description: 允许通孔扩展以满足 LEF 规则

options.name: -allow_wire_shape_change
options.description: 允许通孔改变现有金属线的形状

options.name: -area_only
options.description: 仅在指定区域内添加通孔

options.name: -bot_enclosure
options.description: 自定义底部包覆（enclosure）尺寸

options.name: -create_double_row_cut_via
options.description: 如果可能，将单行或单列通孔扩展为增加一个切割孔

options.name: -create_max_row_cut_via
options.description: 创建最大行数的通孔切割

options.name: -cut_spacing
options.description: 自定义切割孔间距

options.name: -cutclass_preference
options.description: 指定通孔切割类别的偏好

options.name: -disable_via_merging
options.description: 禁用通孔合并

options.name: -extend_out_wire_end
options.description: 将通孔延伸到现有金属线末端之外

options.name: -full_cut_via_only
options.description: 仅允许创建全切割通孔

options.name: -genvia_naming_prefix
options.description: 指定所有通孔名称的前缀

options.name: -hookup_contact_max
options.description: 设置从接触点创建钩连通孔的最大距离，以及在连续 M0 电源地（PG）引脚上两个钩连通孔之间的最大距离

options.name: -hookup_contact_pg_track
options.description: 设置钩连接触点使用的电源地（PG）轨道的起始点和间距

options.name: -hookup_preplace_fix
options.description: 增强钩连通孔生成的运行时间

options.name: -hookup_rail_pair
options.description: 在配对的 followpins 上创建钩连通孔

options.name: -hookup_via_distance
options.description: 设置钩连通孔的距离和边界间距

options.name: -hookup_via_fixed_grid
options.description: 指定在固定网格上添加钩连通孔

options.name: -hookup_via_min_distance
options.description: 两个电源地（PG）通孔之间的最小距离

options.name: -hookup_via_style
options.description: 设置钩连通孔的样式

options.name: -hookup_via_viarule
options.description: 指定在特定区域使用的通孔规则

options.name: -hookup_virtual_trim_grid
options.description: 指定用于电源地（PG）钩连的虚拟修剪网格

options.name: -ignore_design_boundary
options.description: 允许通孔放置在设计边界上

options.name: -ignore_DRC
options.description: 忽略设计规则检查（DRC）

options.name: -ignore_viarule_enclosure
options.description: 忽略 VIARULE GENERATE 中定义的包覆（enclosure）规则

options.name: -inherit_wire_status
options.description: 继承金属线的状态

options.name: -invoke_verifyGeometry
options.description: 调用几何验证（verify_drc）

options.name: -keep_existing_via
options.description: 保留现有通孔

options.name: -keep_fixed_via
options.description: 保留不可修改的固定通孔

options.name: -mincut_preference
options.description: 指定最小切割偏好值

options.name: -optimize_cross_via
options.description: 控制额外切割通孔的创建

options.name: -optimize_via_on_routing_track
options.description: 释放通孔轨道

options.name: -parameterized_via_only
options.description: 仅生成参数化通孔。'auto' 模式在 OA 流程中设为 true，在非 OA 流程中设为 false

options.name: -partial_overlap_threshold
options.description: 指定在部分重叠的金属线上创建通孔的比率阈值

options.name: -preferred_vias_only
options.description: 仅生成在 -viarule_preference 中设置的通孔

options.name: -reference_boundary
options.description: 设置参考边界

options.name: -respect_signal_routes
options.description: 尊重预先存在的信号布线

options.name: -respect_stdcell_geometry
options.description: 尊重所有标准单元图案

options.name: -respect_wire_ndr
options.description: 控制通孔生成是否支持非默认规则（NDR）

options.name: -set_via_expansion_dir
options.description: 设置通孔扩展方向

options.name: -snap_via_center_to_grid
options.description: 按布线层指定通孔中心对齐样式

options.name: -split_long_via_global_grid
options.description: 控制全局网格，使位于其上的通孔对齐

options.name: -symmetrical_via_only
options.description: 仅添加对称通孔。'auto' 模式在 OA 流程中设为 true，在非 OA 流程中设为 false

options.name: -top_enclosure
options.description: 自定义顶部包覆（enclosure）尺寸

options.name: -use_track_offset
options.description: 使用轨道偏移

options.name: -use_trim_metal_enclosure
options.description: 强制工具使用包含修剪层的包覆（enclosure）规则

options.name: -viarule_preference
options.description: 指定通孔规则偏好
